message:
test(proptest): add property tests for cutover, rehearsal, command center, runbooks

Four new proptest suites covering modules from ft-3681t.8.4, .8.6, .9.2, .9.6:

- proptest_cutover_playbook: 28 tests — stage ordering, gate pass/fail,
  advance preconditions, rollback mechanics, telemetry counters
- proptest_migration_rehearsal: 30 tests — scenario categories, execution
  counters, divergence metrics, drill targets, report verdicts
- proptest_swarm_command_center: 32 tests — operator level ordering,
  fuzzy matching, action availability, palette search, health summary,
  latency budgets, update throttling
- proptest_operator_runbooks: 28 tests — role hierarchy, step filtering,
  decision overlays, tutorial arithmetic, registry snapshot consistency

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
